content: TASK-076 checkpoint done: polished release UI terminology and Prototype map interaction after browser review. User-facing Stack labels are now Layer in the shared diagram-tags control, custom element controls, demo markup, and docs. Prototype map mode now places its control panel at the bottom-right and allows dragging the map from screen cards as well as whitespace; controls/panel/form elements remain excluded. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts test/render.test.ts, npm run build, and built-artifact grep for Layer label/right-bottom panel/card-drag condition passed. Remaining release work: final browser smoke on localhost/GitHub Pages, publish 0.1.1 to npm, create/push the v0.1.1 tag, and verify jsDelivr URLs after publish.
